title: cryptandra alpina
intro: Cryptandra alpina, also known as Alpine cryptandra, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cryptandra alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its antimicrobial properties which may help combat bacterial and fungal infections. Cryptandra alpina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
